The python code defines a function named analyze_scores that accepts a list of integers called scores as input
It calculates the average by summing all values and dividing by the total count
The highest score is found using the max function on the list
The lowest score is found using the min function on the list
It counts how many scores are sixty or higher for the passed value
It counts how many scores are below sixty for the failed value
The function returns a dictionary containing all these calculated metrics
This solution works for any valid list of test scores between zero and one hundred
